hotel_name: Fairfield by Marriott Nam Bình Dương (Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Good
reviews.response:
Dear Thuy,

It is amazing hearing your great compliments for Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong.

We trust you had a very relaxing stay with us and look forward to welcoming you back soon.

Best regards,
Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Room, lobby , quality
reviews.negatives: Room service, daily errors in delivery wich is very upsetting

reviews.title: 3-star hotel vs 5-star branding
reviews.text: The hotel is far from the center, the laundry towels are not clean and are thin. The room is small and extremely noisy. To eat, you can only order food from 11 am to 7:30 pm, which is very inconvenient. This hotel is only worth 3 stars. The staff knock on the guests' doors without permission, which is very irresponsible towards guests.
reviews.response:
Xin chào quý khách,

Fairfield chân thành cảm ơn những đánh giá quý báu của quý khách khi đến trải nghiệm các dịch vụ tại khách sạn.

Chúng tôi vô cùng trân trọng quãng thời gian quý báu khi quý khách lưu trú tại đây.

Về những đánh giá mà quý khách gửi đến, chúng tôi thật sự xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm chưa tốt. Chúng tôi đã ghi nhận và khắc phục sự thiếu sót này.

Một lần nữa, chân thành xin lỗi quý khách. Hy vọng được chào đón quý khách trong lần ghé thăm tiếp theo.

Thân mến,

Khieu Tuan.
General Manager.

reviews.title: Worth it
reviews.positives: Swimming pool & food. Good quiet rooms. Good location.
reviews.negatives: Prices for Vietnam in Hotel bar & Restaurant. Like Europe 😀

reviews.title: No greetings and unwelcome Asian
reviews.text: Ask deposit for all items in refrigerator
reviews.response:
Dear Liem,

We appreciate your taking the time to share a review of your stay at Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong.

As we pride ourselves on delivering a memorable hotel experience during your travels, we have unfortunately fallen short of our goal during your recent stay.

We have checked carefully and addressed them.

Once, thank you for your feedback, and apologize for that!

With kindest regards,
Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: nice hotel. I will always stay when I travel to Binh Duong
reviews.positives: breakfast is good. nice hotel.

reviews.title: Going on a business trip
reviews.text: The place is very clean. Luxurious. But unfortunately, the staff's attitude is very poor. I won't be coming back next time!
reviews.response:
Xin chào quý khách,

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình tại Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng chuyến đi của Quý khách chưa thực sự hoàn hảo như mong đợi.  

Chúng tôi luôn không ngừng cải thiện để mang đến dịch vụ tốt nhất, và những đóng góp của quý khách giúp chúng tôi hoàn thiện hơn mỗi ngày.  

Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội chào đón Quý khách trở lại trong thời gian tới và mang đến một kỳ nghỉ thật sự trọn vẹn! 

Trân trọng,

Khieu Tuan
General Manager

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: We were very happy with the hotel and the staff were excellent. The location was great for the working aspect but is a little far from District 1 entertainment.

reviews.title: No chair in room
reviews.text:
This would be a good hotel if it provided chairs in the room.  There are no chairs and the cupboard is not even complete; just some sliding doors.  Gotta say one of the worst Marriott hotels i have been too.  

However the staff are great and breakfast good.
reviews.response:
Dear Lee,

We appreciate your taking the time to share a review of your stay at Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong.

As we pride ourselves on delivering a memorable hotel experience during your travels, we have unfortunately fallen short of our goal during your recent stay.

We have checked carefully and addressed them.

Once, thank you for your feedback, and apologize for that!

With kindest regards,

Phan Thanh Luong.
Director of Operations.

reviews.title: Comfort and peace of mind stay.
reviews.positives: I like the food varieties and freshness of fruits. The chicken pho is fantastic. Warm hospitality service from front desk, restaurant and house-keeping staff. Keep it up!
reviews.negatives: Nil

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Nhà hàng gọi món ăn tối có giá 5* nhưng chất lượng và số lượng chỉ đáng 3*và buffet sáng cũng chỉ 3*. Phòng nghỉ và trang thiết bị đạt 4*, nhưng lobby như nhà nghỉ, không phải hotel du lịch. Là thành viên Marriott, tôi không hiểu, trong group Marriott lại có loại này. Do vậy không dám giới thiệu, vì mình còn không muốn !! Xin Lỗi !!
reviews.response:
Xin chào Nguyen,

Fairfield chân thành cảm ơn đánh giá của bạn khi đến trải nghiệm các dịch vụ tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi vô cùng trân trọng quãng thời gian quý báu khi bạn lưu trú tại đây. 

Xin lỗi bạn vì những trải nghiệm chưa tốt tại Nhà hàng Oryzaa, nhà hàng sẽ cố gắng khắc phục và cải thiện.

Một lần nữa, thành thật xin lỗi và hy vọng sẽ gặp lại bạn trong lần ghé thăm tiếp theo.

Trân trọng,
Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Sales and Marketing

reviews.title: TRANQUILO Y PLACENTERO
reviews.positives: EL DESAYUNO ES VARIADO Y DELICIOSO
reviews.negatives: NO HAY CERCA OTROS RESTAURANTES O SUPERMERCADOS

reviews.title: Nourishment
reviews.text: True to its word. Often hosts customers and friends for stays. Quiet.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you sincerely for sharing your thoughtful feedback about your recent stay at Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong.

I am delighted to know that you had an enjoyable and comfortable experience with us. Your appreciation is a true motivation for our team, encouraging us to continuously deliver exceptional service and memorable stays for all our guests.

I look forward to the pleasure of welcoming you back to Binh Duong in the near future.

With kindest regards,

Khieu Tuan

General Manager

reviews.title: Allez y les yeux fermés !!
reviews.positives: Le style, le bar, le confort, la propreté et le service. J'ai fuit le HIIVE en face pour venir y séjourner !!
reviews.negatives: Rien :!!

reviews.title: Recommended accommodation from the company to visit.
reviews.text: The hotel and its interior rooms are luxurious. The hotel breakfast is fine, but a separate fee is required. GRAB taxis are easy to catch and deliveries come well. It is satisfactory for the price. The quality of the food at the hotel pool and restaurant is also decent; however, the prices at the restaurant are on the higher side. It's a bit disappointing that there's not much accessible nearby, but getting around by taxi is convenient.
reviews.response:
Dear WOOHYUN, 

Warm greetings from Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong and thank you very much for sharing your valuable feedback.

We were pleased to hear you enjoyed your stay and most importantly appreciated your comments about our service. 

It is always a pleasure to have you as our guest and on behalf of all team members at Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong, I look forward to welcoming you back. 
  
With kindest regards,

Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Operations

reviews.title: MEINE GROSSE Aberteuerreise Super
reviews.positives: DIE Freundlichkeit,Aufmerksamkeit,und Achtsamkeit des Personals.Auch die Hilfestellung mir gegenüber.Ich bin 75 Jahre alt.Ich konnte die Sprache nicht und englich nur teilweise verstehen.Es gab aber keine Problemeegal wo ich war und was ich wollte.Danke dafür
reviews.negatives: Es gab nichts was mir nichtgefallen hat.

reviews.title: clean but poor location
reviews.text: clean and simple hotel for business traveler. Breakfast spread is reasonable. Location is very poor. not walkable to any convenient store or eatery. need to take grab to a nearby mall.

reviews.title: The best accommodations in 빈증.
reviews.text:
This is not a tourist destination, but if you are staying here for business, it can certainly be considered the best option. Some people say the breakfast isn't good, but all the basics are there and it meets average standards. The only thing is that the broth for the pho is a bit weak, but you can adjust the taste by adding condiments.

Even without a card key, the air conditioning is working well, the bedding is fresh, and the bathroom is clean. The furniture layout is reasonably good, and there is a swimming pool. However, the meals are a bit expensive, including room service and dinner.

I visited for a staycation and was satisfied, and I would consider returning.

reviews.title: super
reviews.positives:
- heel mooi en goed ingericht hotel
- vriendelijk personeel
- gelegen 10 km buiten het centrum van hcmc
- kleine shop en goed restaurant
reviews.negatives: - 30 a 40 minuten tot het centrum per taxi (moto -> 3 euro  - wagen -> 8 euro)

reviews.title: good service

reviews.title: A very clean hotel that is hard to find in Binjeong.
reviews.text: I stayed for one night on a business trip, and the breakfast, room condition, pool, and gym facilities were all great. There's also an Ion Mall nearby, so I walked there for a stroll. I recommend this hotel if you're looking for a clean place.

reviews.title: Booking nên lưu ý giá phòng không bao gồm ăn sáng trước khi khách book phòng
reviews.positives: Giường gối sạch sẽ, phòng vệ sinh sạch tiện nghi. Khách sạn hỗ trợ trả phòng trễ một chút.
reviews.negatives:
Lễ tân cứ nhìn khách chằm chằm mà không biết cười, khách chờ lâu để cung cấp thông tin. 
Booking không ghi rõ thông tin giá phòng không bao gồm ăn sáng, khi book xong mới có thông tin không ăn sáng, giá phòng này mà không có  ăn sáng là cao

reviews.title: definitely wil come back...
reviews.positives: Good business hotel , quiet environment . Wide selection of  breaky type   , very good customer service in the restaurant. Check-in & Check-out at the front desk is super fast & easy. Definitely will recommend business traveller to stay in Marriott Bin Duong.
reviews.negatives: Room service last call is 9.00pm ! If u are hungry beyond this time, it will be a bit challenging to find some food since no convenience store nearby !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel staff work very professionally, are friendly, and extremely polite. The team made me feel completely comfortable from check-in and throughout my stay. The reception department (Mr. Thong) welcomed guests very attentively. I am very satisfied with the service standards of the hotel.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay in a remote hotel
reviews.positives: The staff are nice and helpful.  Room is clean and comfortable and of decent size.
reviews.negatives: Unless you are on business and your woking place is close by, otherwise you will find the hotel remote.  The closest shopping mall is 20-30 min away (on foot), although it looks close to the hotel.  We dined in twice, and have to say the food is below par (standard is lower than what I would have expected for Marriot).  Breakfast options are also limited.

reviews.title: Great value and service!
reviews.positives: The staff are very pleasant, friendly & helpful.  The hotel had a nice decor and feels new.  Room is clean and big.  The bed is big and comfortable.  Very good value for money.
reviews.negatives: A bit far from the centre, but calling a taxi is easy and will get you to the centre in 30 min.  Couldn't seem to change the air conditioner setting. But can't complain at this price!

reviews.title: Outstanding hotel for business with very best staff!
reviews.positives: This was an excellent hotel for us to stay in for doing some business in the locality.  The staff were outstanding, and efficiently sorted us out, when there was a slight issue with our room.  The pool and gym were beautiful and we loved using.  Great food.  This is definitely the outstanding hotel to stay at while doing business in the locality.
reviews.negatives: This was perfect for a business hotel and nothing more was required.

reviews.title: Hotel buiten HCMC
reviews.text: Prima hotel! Het ligt redelijk ver buiten HCMC maar voor ons was het een goed hotel voor familie bezoek in de buurt. Uitstekend ontbijt, prima kamer en uitstekend bed!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It is a 4.5 star hotel punching above its weight. Very clean, very comfortable bed. Great gym and pool..Enjoyed dinner and breakfast. Rate very good.
reviews.negatives: No rubbish bin in the car park.

reviews.title: 事務所から近いので
reviews.text: VSHIP 1の中にある綺麗なホテル。さすがはマリオットと思わせるビジネスホテル。

reviews.title: Superb! Will definitely be staying again
reviews.positives: Staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful
reviews.negatives: Location was the only issue. Far away from Ho Chi Minh and any sights. But the hotel made up for that plenty.

reviews.title: 設備も接客も申し分なし。
reviews.text: Check In３分。Check out２分。新しいHOTELでまだ顧客が少ないようだが、笑顔での対応、施設の充実度、清潔度、サービスとどれをとってもとても満足です。
reviews.response:
Dear TADAHIKO,

We appreciate your taking the time to share a review of your stay at Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong. Thank you for your good reviews.

We are glad you had a great stay with us. Your comments about our location, our room, as well as our service.

Delivering authentic hospitality is what we strive to do and comments like yours make us feel even more proud.

We hope you will have an opportunity to revisit us soon.

With kindest regards,
Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Amazing hotel, really great standard with friendly service and delicious breakfast. Tommy the beverage and foods manager always available for a nice chat and any assistance you may need. Also Phat and thong always available if you need them. I can definitely recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: 是非おすすめ
reviews.text:
VSIP-1に隣接する、綺麗なホテルです。
出張に最適だと思います。イオンモールへも徒歩で行くことが出来ます。
驚きはディナービュッフェで、25万ドンでビール２本付き、海鮮メインのメニューはＣＰ最高です。
プールサイドバーも素敵で、部屋や建物内も綺麗です。
惜しむらくは、部屋に靴べらがあればいいかな、と思いました。
reviews.response:
Dear AKIRA,

It is amazing hearing your great compliments for Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong, especially about the experienced at ORYZAA Restaurant.

We are glad that you have enjoyed the room and our services. We hope to welcome you again in the not-too-distant future.

With kindest regards,
Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: 최고였습니다
reviews.text: 주변에 아무것도 없어서 위치는 별로긴 했지만 신축호텔이라 컨디션도 좋고 무엇보다 수영장 관리시설이 잘되어있는데 전세낸거 처럼 혼자 썼네요. 덕분에 베트남 빈증에서의 기억이 좋게 남았습니다. 오픈이벤트로 조식 무료 서비스중인데.. 너무 먹을게 없었습니다 ㅠㅠ룸서비스로 시킨 음식은 진짜 맛있었는데... 조식은 ... 다른 낮은성급의 호텔이 더 나았습니다 ㅠㅠ

With kindest regards, 
Phan Thanh Luong

reviews.title: Ruột gối ko giặt, cực kì hôi hám mất vs
reviews.text: Đồ ăn trong phòng để bán cho khách không có. Gối cực hôi
reviews.response:
Xin chào Hoa,

Fairfield xin dành lời cảm ơn chân thành đến đánh giá của bạn khi đến lưu trú tại khách sạn chúng tôi.

Thông tin bạn đưa ra, chúng tôi thật sự xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm không tốt. Chúng tôi đã ghi nhận và khắc phục sự thiếu sót này.

Một lần nữa, chân thành xin lỗi bạn. Hy vọng được chào đón bạn trong lần ghé thăm tiếp theo.

Thân mến,
Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: Phòng đẹp và tiện nghi
reviews.text: Giải trí đơn điệu nhưng thức ăn ngon
reviews.response:
Xin chào Thanh,

Fairfield xin dành lời cảm ơn chân thành đến đánh giá của bạn khi đến lưu trú tại khách sạn.

Chúng tôi cũng rất trân trọng quãng thời gian quý báu bạn dành để trải nghiệm khách sạn.

Hy vọng sẽ gặp lại bạn trong thời gian tới.

Thân mến,
Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: Chất lượng ở mức Tốt nhưng còn có thể cải thiện để Xuất sắc
reviews.text:
Cơ sở vật chất nên bổ sung:
- Thìa khuấy cafe / trà trong phòng
- Dép nhựa dùng nhiều lần thay vì dép lông vì khách có thể dùng để đi bộ ra ngoài
- Máy hút mùi trong toilet
Chất lượng thức ăn:
- Mùi vị chưa thật sự đậm đà
- Hải sản (mực) chưa thật tươi nên hơi có mùi tanh
- Salad của buổi sáng là cũ của tối hôm trước nên hơi héo
reviews.response:
Xin chào Nguyen,

Fairfield rất vui khi bạn đã dành thời gian quý báu của mình để đưa ra những nhận xét.

Fairfield chân thành cảm ơn những đóng góp của bạn để giúp chúng tôi ngay một tốt hơn. Chúng tôi đã tiếp nhận những ý kiến về cơ sở vật chất và cải thiện chất lượng thức ăn.

Một lần nữa, cảm ơn về những đóng góp tốt của bạn dành cho chúng tôi.

Hy vọng sẽ gặp lại bạn sớm trong lần ghé thăm tiếp theo.

Thân mến,
Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: 舒服的住宿。值得再次造訪
reviews.text: 服務人員態度親切。床鋪很舒適。 早餐選擇多樣。對於商務旅客來說，如果能夠有亮一點的枱燈就完美了。
reviews.response:
Dear Mei,

Thank you for choosing us for your stay and for your exceptional rating.

We are delighted to know that you enjoyed your stay with us and that we provided you with the best. Our team is dedicated to giving guests a welcoming experience and a comfortable stay, and your positive words mean a lot to them.  

We hope to enhance this experience even further in the future. We are indeed looking forward to your next visit!

With best regards,

Khieu Tuan
General Manager.

reviews.title: Fantastic hotel!
reviews.text: Stayed at this hotel totally made business trip a great one! It’s right in the VSIP industrial zone, not much of fun around, but it’s close to our customers and the hotel itself just wonderful.  Stylish decor, great food, spacious room with functional designs. All has been considered for a 5-star hotel. Strongly recommended, especially for those ones busy biz traveling like us - able to really relax after long day!!! 👍

reviews.title: 全新酒店开心之旅
reviews.text: 开业几个月，房间非常新和卫生很好，不算豪华但非常舒适，员工服务很好，游泳池刚好，会经常入住，距离吉之岛很近，走路去也就15分钟
reviews.response:
Dear Chung, 

Warm greetings from Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong and thank you very much for taking the time to share your valuable feedback.

We were pleased to hear you enjoyed your stay and most importantly appreciated your comments about our fabulous facilities. 

It is always a pleasure to have you as our guest and on behalf of all team members at Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong, I look forward to welcoming you back. 

With kindest regards, 
Phan Thanh Luong 
Director of Sales & Marketing

reviews.title: 超乎預期
reviews.text:
因為宿舍維修，暫時到Fairfield住幾天。住宿體驗超乎預期。入住第一個晚上有水果盤招待，而且原本只買一天的早餐，飯店還免費招待了後續兩天的早餐。飯店內的每個人員都很親切，不論職務都會跟客人有禮貌的打招呼。餐廳用餐時，大廚還會親自跟客人確認餐點滿意度，還會關心客人的住房體驗。服務台和餐廳人員都記得你的名字，並且用名字稱呼你，非常細心又親切！飯店人員入職都需要經過英文學習，而且腔調不是「越式英文」，容易聽懂，可以用英文溝通非常方便！

棉被有點熱。廁所沒有抽風設備，上大號要把廁所門關起來等散味，不然會很臭。唯一比較可惜的是沒有有浴缸的房型。
reviews.response:
Dear Yu,

Thank you very much for staying at Fairfield by Marriott South Binh Duong and sharing your review.

I am very happy to learn that you enjoyed the stay while our hotel facilities and services are up to your expectations. 

Delivering authentic hospitality is what we strive to do and comments like yours make us feel even more proud.

We hope you will have an opportunity to revisit us soon.

With kindest regards,
Phan Thanh Luong
Director of Sales & Marketing
